overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a medieval rural village at night, transitioning to open grassland meadows. The scene features atmospheric low lighting with torch-lit wooden houses and lush green fields under a dark sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval village street with wooden houses and torch lighting

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily through the village path, passing wooden houses with thatched roofs and lit torches

entered.detail: rustic wooden house with thatched roof and warm light glowing from windows
small wooden hut with straw thatching on the roof
rough-hewn wooden fence posts lining the dirt path
wooden post with bright orange flame providing warm illumination
narrow winding dirt trail through the village

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through a quiet medieval village at night, passing rustic wooden houses with thatched roofs. Warm torchlight illuminates the dirt path while wooden fences line the walkway. The atmosphere is calm and atmospheric with cool blue night tones contrasting the orange firelight.

scene_state.functional_zone: village outskirts transitioning to open meadows

events.description: passing the last village houses and entering open countryside with distant forest visible

agents.ego_description: Geralt continuing along the path as the village structures give way to open grassland

entered.detail: dark silhouette of trees on the horizon against the night sky
tall green grass and wildflowers growing alongside the path
rocks and boulders scattered in the grass

segments.scene_description: Leaving the village behind, the scene opens into meadows with tall grass replacing the wooden structures. The path continues through the countryside with a distant forest visible on the horizon. The lighting becomes darker as the warm torchlight fades, leaving only ambient moonlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland meadow with winding path through tall grass

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through the dark meadow, following the narrow dirt path surrounded by tall grass and wildflowers

entered.detail: rolling hills silhouetted against the dark night sky
blue and yellow wildflowers growing in the tall grass

segments.scene_description: Deep in the open countryside, Geralt follows the winding path through dense tall grass and wildflowers. The village is now far behind, with only distant forests and hills visible on the horizon. The environment is dark and atmospheric, with the narrow trail cutting through the lush meadow under the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a cozy, torch-lit medieval village into the vast, moonlit expanse of the open countryside. It begins by following Geralt along a dirt path lined with rustic wooden houses and thatched roofs, where warm orange firelight contrasts with the cool blue tones of the night. As the village structures recede, the scene opens into wide meadows where tall grass replaces the wooden fences and the warm glow of the torches fades into ambient moonlight. The camera then continues deep into the rural landscape, following a winding trail through dense grass and wildflowers. Finally, the environment expands further to reveal distant forests and hills on the horizon, leaving the village far behind under a dark, atmospheric night sky.
